name: update
description: Meta entry: refresh indexes and upgrade packages per distro. Use with ?d=<distro>.

examples.command: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade
sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper update
sudo apk update && sudo apk upgrade

distroVariants.ubuntu: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade
distroVariants.debian: sudo apt update && sudo apt upgrade
distroVariants.opensuse: sudo zypper refresh && sudo zypper update
distroVariants.alpine: sudo apk update && sudo apk upgrade
